evals.prompt: /book --text "Kubernetes 三層架構：Control Plane（API Server、Scheduler、etcd）、Node（kubelet、kube-proxy、Container Runtime）、Pod（最小部署單位）。核心物件包括 Deployment（管理 ReplicaSet 確保 Pod 數量）、Service（提供穩定 ClusterIP endpoint）、ConfigMap / Secret（設定注入）。HPA 依 CPU / memory metrics 自動水平擴縮；Ingress 作為 L7 負載均衡入口，路由到不同 Service。"
evals.expected_output: A Kami-themed HTML file at .claude/book/<slug>.html with: at least 1 SVG diagram, TOC nav, 4-8 sections, validates via validate-output.ts

assertions.description: An .html file was produced in the outputs directory
assertions.check: glob outputs/*.html has at least 1 match

assertions.description: HTML contains <article class="paper"> — the Kami paper container
HTML contains <nav class="toc-wrap"> — the sticky TOC navigation
At least 1 SVG diagram, with balanced open/close tags
assertions.check: python3 -c "c=open('output.html').read(); assert c.count('<svg') >= 1 and c.count('<svg') == c.count('</svg>'), 'SVG fail'"

assertions.description: Sections use the .sec-num span pattern (e.g. 01)
Visible body text is within the 1800-word cap
assertions.check: python3 -c "from html.parser import HTMLParser; import re; c=open('output.html').read(); text=re.sub('<[^>]+>','',c); wc=len(text.split()); assert wc <= 1800 * 3, f'word count {wc} exceeds generous cap'"

evals.expected_output: A Kami-themed HTML file re-rendering the existing read material, with SVG diagram and proper structure

assertions.description: An .html file was produced in the outputs directory
assertions.check: glob outputs/*.html has at least 1 match

assertions.description: HTML contains <article class="paper"> — the Kami paper container
HTML contains <nav class="toc-wrap"> — the sticky TOC navigation
At least 1 SVG diagram, with balanced open/close tags
assertions.check: python3 -c "c=open('output.html').read(); assert c.count('<svg') >= 1 and c.count('<svg') == c.count('</svg>'), 'SVG fail'"

assertions.description: Output references concepts from the context engineering source material (langchain or context mentioned)

evals.expected_output: A Kami-themed HTML file converting a public URL, with SVG and structured sections

assertions.description: An .html file was produced in the outputs directory
assertions.check: glob outputs/*.html has at least 1 match

assertions.description: HTML contains <article class="paper"> — the Kami paper container
HTML contains <nav class="toc-wrap"> — the sticky TOC navigation
At least 1 SVG diagram, with balanced open/close tags
assertions.check: python3 -c "c=open('output.html').read(); assert c.count('<svg') >= 1 and c.count('<svg') == c.count('</svg>'), 'SVG fail'"

assertions.description: No local src= references point to missing files (validate-output.ts check)
assertions.check: python3 -c "import re; c=open('output.html').read(); local=[s for s in re.findall(r'src=\"([^\"]+)\"', c) if not s.startswith(('http','data')); import os; missing=[s for s in local if not os.path.exists(s)]; assert not missing, f'missing assets: {missing}'"
